channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Complete John Carpenter’s Toxic Commando Trophy List—How To Get All Achievements & Trophies
item.content:encoded:
John Carpenter’s Toxic Commando players have plenty to do to fully complete the game, with a long list of achievements and trophies waiting to be ticked off.

Saber Interactive‘s newest horde shooter uses the Swarm Engine, making hundreds of zombies group up on the screen. If you’re on the hunt for every achievement and trophy available in John Carpenter’s Toxic Commando while dealing with them, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All John Carpenter’s Toxic Commando Trophies & Achievements

Toxic Commando has a long list of trophies and achievements for completionists to pursue, some of which require a good amount of grind. The most challenging of the trophies is completing a mission on Hard difficulty without getting hit. For the rest, it all comes down to leveling up every class and killing thousands of zombies.

  • More Insider Gaming: Toxic Commando HANDS-ON PREVIEW

*Spoiler warning*

The trophies and achievements shown below may include hidden or secret items, so this is your warning that spoilers may lie ahead.

How Many Achievements & Trophies in John Carpenter’s Toxic Commando?

There are 57 achievements and trophies to collect in Toxic Commando, including the coveted Platinum trophy on PlayStation 5.

While many of the achievements and trophies can be earned naturally through progression, others require specific attention. Additionally, you will need to complete every mission at least two times, once on Hard and again on Very Hard difficulty.

Do you plan to play Toxic Commando? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Make sure to check out some Toxic Commando gameplay, if you haven’t already.

MOBILE APP

item.title: BLAST Rivals Fort Worth Teams Announced; Six Decline NA Event
item.content:encoded:
BLAST has announced the invites for BLAST Rivals Fort Worth. The eight-team event saw six of the top teams decline invites for the $1,000,000 North American Counter-Strike tournament.

The following teams accepted the invite:

  • Vitality
  • Furia
  • NAVI
  • Astralis
  • G2
  • FaZe
  • GamerLegion
  • FUT

Six big-hitters decline BLAST Rivals invitation

As such, there is no North American team representation as part of the event, though Canada’s Russel ‘Twistzz’ Van Dulken and Guatemala’s Mario ‘malbsMd’ Samayoa can still represent their region on international teams.

Of the eight invited teams, MOUZ, Falcons, Parivision, Spirit, Aurora, and The MongolZ all declined. Those declines will be a major blow to the event and BLAST as they aim to sell out the 14,000-seat Dickies Arena.

However, teams declining an NA event is not specific to this event. ESL’s IEM Atlanta 2026 only attracted three of the top 10 teams, again, Vitality, NAVI, and Astralis accepted. The remaining seven will instead play PGL Astana.

It is believed that the threat of Visa issues, as well as the additional travel burden, acted as disincentives for IEM Atlanta, factors that also apply to BLAST Fort Worth.

The combination of geopolitical factors and the extreme schedule crunch that VRS demands of Tier-1 rosters may be persistent issues for events in the United States for the foreseeable future.

BLAST outline 2028 events, with clashes expected

BLAST also announced dates for their 2028 events, announcing events on January 10-24, February 21-March 6, April 3-17, and May 1-15.

Three of the dates clash with announced calendar slots taken by PGL or ESL, with the January, February, and April events featuring at least some overlap, though the February event only has its opening day affected by a PGL Grand Final day.

The jostle over calendar space has led to an increasing arms race of hospitality, financial incentives, and LAN matches to attract more teams for reasons of player comfort, org finances, and to maximise VRS offering. BLAST is no exception, having vastly increased the LAN matches in its circuit from 2027 onwards.

The announcement includes two further events which are yet to receive a date or location.

Who do you think is going to win the Tournament Organiser wars? You can discuss that and more on our community Discord Server

For more on the Counter-Strike ecosystem, see the recently announced PGL 2027-28 Roadmap

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.title: Marvel Rivals Season 7 Release Date Countdown & Exact Start Times
item.content:encoded:
Marvel Rivals continue to keep the content coming thick and fast, with Season 7 already fast approaching. It seems like you’ll be ditching cosmic adventures for some high-stakes heists with Spider-Man’s forever-fling, Black Cat, and it can’t come soon enough.

Season 6 of Marvel Rivals made waves across the internet with the long-awaited addition of the Merc with a Mouth, Deadpool. It’ll be a tough season to follow up, but if there’s a team who can do it, it’s NetEase.

If you’re ready to crack some safes and flirt with Spider-Man, here’s when Season 7 of Marvel Rivals will be released.

What Is The Marvel Rivals Season 7 Release Date?

Marvel Rivals Season 7 is expected to begin on March 20, 2026, after a slightly longer Season 6 than usual.

If NetEase had stuck to the usual one month seasonal cycle, the update would have rolled around on March 15. However, it seems like there’s a lot of content planned for Marvel Rivals in the near future, so the longer dev time makes perfect sense.

  • More Insider Gaming: Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall Release Date

Of course, with a new Season comes a whole host of new content to enjoy. It seems like Black Cat will be the first new character, but expect White Fox to be hot on her heels by the time Season 7.5 rolls around in a month’s time.

Marvel Rivals Season 7 Release Times

No official release times have been shared, but judging by the regular schedule, you can expect Season 7 of Marvel Rivals to arrive at 3 AM PT on March 20, 2026.

  • More Insider Gaming: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Release Date

A new Season is always the most exciting time to play Marvel Rivals, with a new meta undoubtedly ready to rear its head. If you’re dying to get into the action but you’re not from the West Coast, here’s when you can play Marvel Rivals Season 7:

Are you excited to play Marvel Rivals Season 7? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming content, check out how to play Ghost of Yotei Legends.

item.title: Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall Release Date Countdown & Start Times
item.content:encoded:
Battlefield 6 is right in the midst of Season 2, but the second update, Nightfall, is fast approaching. From a brand new map to an exciting limited-time event, it’s looking like an update you won’t want to miss.

DICE originally delayed the second Season of Battlefield 6 by a few weeks to improve upon the content calendar. It’s been questionable whether the improvements were worth the wait, but you’ll know for sure by the time Nightfall rolls around.

If you’re looking to dive into the action in Battlefield 6 Season 2, then here’s when Nightfall will release.

What Is Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall’s Release Date?

You won’t have to wait much longer, as Nightfall is set to release in Battlefield 6 Season 2 on March 17, 2026.

Aside from the new maps, you’ll be able to get your hands on another new vehicle, as well as a handful of new weapons. Excitingly, the new vehicle is a Dirt Bike, which is set to be the fastest land vehicle in the game. Partner that with the VZ.61 Sidearm and you’ll be cruising through the maps with ease.

  • More Insider Gaming: MLB The Show 26 Release Date

Don’t forget Redsec, though, as Battlefield 6’s battle royale is getting some updates, too. Fort-Lyndon will be expanded underground with a brand new POI—the Defence Testing Complex 3.

Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall Release Times

No release dates have been officially confirmed, but assuming that Nightfall will follow the same timings as prior updates, it will arrive in Battlefield 6 Season 2 at 4 AM PT on March 17, 2026.

  • More Insider Gaming: Starfield PS5 Release Date Revealed

It’s an early morning for those of you on the West Coast, but that leaves you all day to dive into everything new with Nightfall. However, fans from across the globe are bound to be tuning in for its launch, so here’s a table with adjusted times for various time zones:

Are you excited to play Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming content, check out when Chapter 7 Season 2 of Fortnite is kicking off.
